Package com.audiodo.aspen

Enum IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause>
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause>
    Enclosing class:
    IDeviceServiceCallbacks
    public static enum IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause
extends java.lang.Enum<IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause>
    Causes for session termination

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant Description
      AUTHORIZATION_DENIED
      The device did not accept our authorization keys.
      This is not recoverable, something is wrong in the configuration.
      AUTHORIZATION_TIMEOUT
      Authorization timed out.
      COMMUNICATION_ERROR
      Device returned an error to the latest communication
      COMMUNICATION_TIMEOUT
      Communication timed out.
      DEVICE_POWERED_OFF
      The device has powered off.
      MODEL_ID_MISMATCH
      Received model id from audio device does not match with created device.
      NEW_CLIENT_CONNECTED
      A new client has connected.
      ON_FEATURE_MISMATCH
      Audio device's supported features does not match between sessions
      PROTOCOL_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED
      Protocol version of device is higher than that of client.
      SESSION_CLOSED_BY_CLIENT
      Session was closed by client
      TWS_ROLE_HANDOVER
      TWS buds are switching roles, terminate session

      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • COMMUNICATION_ERROR

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause COMMUNICATION_ERROR
        Device returned an error to the latest communication

      • COMMUNICATION_TIMEOUT

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause COMMUNICATION_TIMEOUT
        Communication timed out. Device took too long time to respond.

      • AUTHORIZATION_DENIED

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause AUTHORIZATION_DENIED
        The device did not accept our authorization keys.
        This is not recoverable, something is wrong in the configuration.

      • AUTHORIZATION_TIMEOUT

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause AUTHORIZATION_TIMEOUT
        Authorization timed out. Device took too long to respond.

      • DEVICE_POWERED_OFF

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause DEVICE_POWERED_OFF
        The device has powered off. This will close the connection

      • NEW_CLIENT_CONNECTED

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause NEW_CLIENT_CONNECTED
        A new client has connected. Close the current connection.

      • TWS_ROLE_HANDOVER

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause TWS_ROLE_HANDOVER
        TWS buds are switching roles, terminate session

      • PROTOCOL_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause PROTOCOL_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED
        Protocol version of device is higher than that of client.

      • MODEL_ID_MISMATCH

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause MODEL_ID_MISMATCH
        Received model id from audio device does not match with created device.

      • ON_FEATURE_MISMATCH

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause ON_FEATURE_MISMATCH
        Audio device's supported features does not match between sessions

      • SESSION_CLOSED_BY_CLIENT

        public static final IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause SESSION_CLOSED_BY_CLIENT
        Session was closed by client

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause c : IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause valueOf​(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null
